plan.failureSummary: The test failed because the cached automation instructions (DETERMINISTIC mode) tried to interact with a 'Last Name' field that does not exist in the current UI state. Visual evidence shows the page is currently displaying 'Set 2' of the survey, which uses 'Your Name' instead of 'Last Name'.
observedIndicators: visual evidence: 'Set 2' badge on failure vs expected fields in cache

remediationSteps.summary: Clear the page.ai cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details: Execute the test again with the 'clearPageAiCache' directive enabled. This will force the AI to re-analyze the 'Set 2' UI and generate fresh, valid selectors.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic mode for this non-deterministic survey.
remediationSteps.details: If the survey fields change randomly per session, deterministic mode is inappropriate. Update the test to use 'runMode: \"AUTONOMOUS\"' or disable caching for this flow to ensure it always adapts to the visible fields.

plan.notes: The application ('unstable-survey') appears to intentionally randomize its form fields between runs. Since the test is running in DETERMINISTIC mode, it relies on a stale cache from a previous run (likely 'Set 1'). Clearing the cache will allow the autonomous agent to adapt to the current UI layout. Given the high flakiness in history (52% pass rate), consider disabling deterministic mode for this specific test if the UI continues to rotate frequently.
